title: WebSocket Message Contracts
description: JSON Schema definitions for all WebSocket message types in the Bonsai Backend API

mimeType.description: MIME type of the image (e.g., image/png, image/jpeg, image/webp)

ImageParameterValue.description: Image parameter value structure for multimodal parameters

format.description: Audio format identifier (pcm, mp3, wav, opus)

mimeType.description: MIME type of the audio (e.g., audio/pcm, audio/mpeg, audio/wav)

channels.description: Number of audio channels (1 for mono, 2 for stereo)

AudioParameterValue.description: Audio parameter value structure for multimodal parameters

ParameterValue.description: Value of the parameter, can be a primitive type, an array of primitives, a free-form JSON object, or a multimodal parameter (image or audio)

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

type.description: Message type discriminator for the union type system

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

sendVoiceInput.description: Whether the client can send voice input

sendTextInput.description: Whether the client can send text input

receiveVoiceOutput.description: Whether the client wants to receive voice output

receiveTranscriptionUpdates.description: Whether the client wants to receive intermediate transcription updates for voice input and output

receiveEvents.description: Whether the client wants to receive all conversation events (e.g. turn start/end, agent actions)

sendAudioFormat.description: Audio format the client sends for voice input (e.g. pcm_16000, opus, mulaw). Defaults to pcm_16000.

receiveAudioFormat.description: Preferred audio format for AI voice output. Omit to receive the provider native format without conversion. Defaults to pcm_16000.

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

sessionId.description: Unique identifier for the automatically created session

acceptVoice.description: Whether conversations can accept voice input

settings.description: ASR-specific settings including model, language preferences, etc.

unintelligiblePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text to use when speech is unintelligible or cannot be transcribed

voiceActivityDetection.description: Whether to enable voice activity detection to automatically start/stop recording based on speech presence

asrConfig.description: ASR configuration settings with full ASR settings

language.description: The language code for speech recognition (e.g., 'en-US')

dictionaryPhrases.description: The phrases to add to the speech recognition dictionary

audioFormat.description: Audio input format for speech recognition (e.g., "pcm_16000")

modelId.description: Model ID to use for transcription (e.g., "scribe_v2_realtime"), defaults to scribe_v2_realtime

audioFormat.description: Audio encoding format for speech-to-text, defaults to pcm_16000

languageCode.description: Language code in ISO 639-1 or ISO 639-3 format (e.g., "en", "es")

includeTimestamps.description: Whether to receive word-level timestamps in transcription results, defaults to false

includeLanguageDetection.description: Whether to include detected language code in transcription results, defaults to false

commitStrategy.description: Strategy for committing transcriptions - manual or voice activity detection, defaults to manual

vadSilenceThresholdSecs.description: Silence threshold in seconds for VAD (0.3-3), defaults to 1.5

vadThreshold.description: Threshold for voice activity detection (0.1-0.9), defaults to 0.4

minSpeechDurationMs.description: Minimum speech duration in milliseconds (50-2000), defaults to 100

minSilenceDurationMs.description: Minimum silence duration in milliseconds (50-2000), defaults to 100

enableLogging.description: When false, zero retention mode is used (enterprise only), defaults to true

modelId.description: Model ID to use for transcription (e.g., "nova-3", "nova-2", "base", "enhanced"), defaults to nova-3

audioFormat.description: Audio encoding format for speech-to-text, defaults to pcm_16000

interimResults.description: Enable interim (partial) transcription results during streaming, defaults to false

endpointing.description: Milliseconds of silence to wait before finalizing speech (10+) or false to disable, defaults to 300

smartFormat.description: Apply formatting (punctuation, capitalization, currency, etc.) to improve readability, defaults to true

punctuate.description: Add punctuation and capitalization to transcript, defaults to true

diarize.description: Recognize and label different speakers in the audio, defaults to false

utteranceEndMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before sending UtteranceEnd event (use with interim_results)

vadEvents.description: Send SpeechStarted events when speech is detected, defaults to false

sampleRate.description: Audio sample rate in Hz (8000, 16000, 22050, 24000, 44100), defaults to 16000

formatTurns.description: Enable formatted transcripts with capitalization and punctuation (adds latency, not recommended for voice agents), defaults to false

speechModel.description: Speech model to use: English-only or multilingual (supports English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese), defaults to universal-streaming-english

keytermsPrompt.description: List of custom words or phrases to improve recognition accuracy

vadThreshold.description: Voice activity detection confidence threshold (0.0 to 1.0) for classifying audio frames as silence, defaults to 0.4

endOfTurnConfidenceThreshold.description: Confidence threshold (0.0 to 1.0) for determining end of turn, defaults to 0.4

minEndOfTurnSilenceWhenConfident.description: Minimum silence in milliseconds required to detect end of turn when confident, defaults to 400

maxTurnSilence.description: Maximum silence in milliseconds allowed in a turn before triggering end of turn, defaults to 1280

inactivityTimeout.description: Time in seconds of inactivity before session is terminated (5-3600), no timeout if not set

audioFormat.description: Audio input format for speech recognition, defaults to pcm_16000

transcriptionMode.description: Transcription mode: "standard" for faster processing or "enhanced" for higher accuracy, defaults to standard

enablePunctuation.description: Enable automatic punctuation in transcripts, defaults to true

enableFormatting.description: Enable automatic formatting (numbers, dates, currency, etc.), defaults to true

additionalVocab.description: Custom vocabulary words or phrases to improve recognition accuracy

enableDiarization.description: Enable speaker diarization to detect different speakers, defaults to false

maxDelay.description: Maximum delay in seconds for transcription results (0-10), lower values reduce latency

mode.description: VAD aggressiveness level (0–3). Higher values are more aggressive at filtering non-speech. Default: 2.

frameDurationMs.description: Duration of each VAD processing frame in milliseconds. Must be 10, 20, or 30. Default: 20.

silencePaddingMs.description: Amount of silence (in ms) to prepend before the detected speech start as a pre-roll buffer. Default: 300.

autoEndSilenceDurationMs.description: Duration of silence (in ms) after speech that triggers end-of-utterance detection. Default: 800.

ServerVadConfig.description: Server-side VAD configuration. When set, the server autonomously detects speech boundaries — clients send continuous audio without calling start/end_user_voice_input.

acceptVoice.description: Whether conversations can accept voice input

settings.description: ASR-specific settings including model, language preferences, etc.

unintelligiblePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text to use when speech is unintelligible or cannot be transcribed

voiceActivityDetection.description: Whether to enable voice activity detection to automatically start/stop recording based on speech presence

asrConfig.description: ASR configuration settings with full ASR settings

userId.description: Identifier of the user initiating the conversation

agentId.description: Optional agent identifier to use for the conversation

stageId.description: Stage ID to initiate the conversation at a specific stage

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for this conversation (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/Warsaw). Overrides user profile and project timezone settings. Defaults to UTC when not provided by any source.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

error.description: Error message if conversation creation failed

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests
Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

error.description: Error message if conversation resumption failed

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests
Unique identifier for request correlation and tracking

error.description: Error message if conversation termination failed

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

inputTurnId.description: Identifier of the input turn associated with this event, when applicable

outputTurnId.description: Identifier of the output turn associated with this event, when applicable

visibility.description: Visibility setting for the message: always (always visible), stage (visible only in current stage), never (never visible), conditional (visible based on condition)

condition.description: Condition for visibility, evaluated against conversation variables

stageId.description: ID of the stage where execution is taking place

actions.description: Names of all matched actions in original order

actionName.description: Name of the action this effect originates from

effects.description: Final ordered list of effects after filtering, sorting, and conflict resolution

lifecycleContext.description: Lifecycle context in which execution is taking place; null for user-input-triggered executions

sourceActionName.description: Name of the action that triggered this tool call, if triggered by an action effect
Name of the action that triggered conversation end, if triggered by an action effect
Name of the action that triggered conversation abort, if triggered by an action effect
Name of the action that triggered this stage jump, if triggered by an action effect
Name of the action that triggered this variable update

variables.description: Snapshot of all conversation variables after the update

sourceActionName.description: Name of the action that triggered this profile update
Name of the action that triggered this input modification

modifiedInput.description: The modified user input after template rendering

sourceActionName.description: Name of the action that triggered the ban
Name of the action that triggered this visibility change

visibility.description: Visibility setting for the message: always (always visible), stage (visible only in current stage), never (never visible), conditional (visible based on condition)

condition.description: Condition for visibility, evaluated against conversation variables

visibility.description: The new visibility settings for current turn messages

classifierId.description: ID of the classifier that performed the selection

input.description: The user input that triggered the selection

sampleCopy.description: Identifier of selected sample copy, or null if none was selected

eventData.description: Data associated with the conversation event

requestId.description: Optional request ID for correlating responses with requests

reason.description: Optional reason for ending the conversation
Optional reason for aborting the conversation

stageId.description: ID of the stage to switch to

template.description: Template to render and replace user input with

modifications.description: Array of variable modifications to apply

variableName.description: Name of the variable to modify

operation.description: Operation to perform: set (assign value), reset (clear value), add (append to array), remove (remove from array)

value.description: Value for the operation (not used for reset operation)

modifications.description: Array of user profile field modifications to apply

fieldName.description: Name of the profile field to modify

operation.description: Operation to perform: set (assign value), reset (clear value), add (append to array), remove (remove from array)

value.description: Value for the operation (not used for reset operation)

toolId.description: ID of the tool to call

parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the tool

responseMode.description: Type of response to generate: generated (AI-generated), prescripted (predefined response), best_match (choose the best match from predefined responses)

prescriptedSelectionStrategy.description: Strategy to select prescripted response when multiple are provided

prescriptedResponses.description: Optional array of prescripted responses to use

visibility.description: Visibility setting: always (always visible), stage (visible only in current stage), never (never visible), conditional (visible based on a JavaScript condition expression)

condition.description: JavaScript condition expression evaluated against the conversation context — required when visibility is "conditional"

reason.description: Optional reason for banning the user

outputTurnId.description: Identifier of the output turn associated with this event, when applicable
